schemes.benefit_en: Input support, certification, premium markets — Sikkim is India's 1st fully organic state
schemes.benefit_hi: निविष्टि सहायता, प्रमाणन, प्रीमियम बाजार — सिक्किम भारत का पहला जैविक राज्य
schemes.eligibility: All Sikkim farmers (mandatory organic — full government support)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh/year comprehensive health cover for all Sikkim families
schemes.benefit_hi: सभी सिक्किम परिवारों को ₹2 लाख/वर्ष स्वास्थ्य बीमा

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2,000-3,000/month social security pension for all Sikkim senior citizens
